body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"root cause is factually incorrect in head: tool_call and tool_result already call resetidle() at agent_runner_service.go:364 and :383: The bead claims that tool-call lifecycle events (tool_call, tool_result) do NOT reset the idle timer and must be added as meaningful events. In HEAD (agent_runner_service.go lines 362-383), both tool_call and tool_result already call resetIdle(); they have been 'meaningful' since commit e0b7b9d53 (feat(agent): wedge prevention via loop-detection + meaningful-event idle reset). TestWedgeImmune_HardWorkRunsToCompletion (wedge_test.go:190) already covers AC-1's scenario. The bead is either obsolete or, if the intent is to additionally reset on progress/text_delta events, it conflicts with TestIdleTimer_ResetsOnlyOnMeaningfulEvents (wedge_test.go:79), which explicitly tests the opposite. An agent given this bead as written would have no coherent edit to make: the root cause is wrong, the proposed fix is already present, and the AC-1 test it asks to create already exists in substance.","fingerprint":"42b3853151a3452e4a2c84e5c14bc47179edb2acec92e0d54d31490243bbd63d","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment","warning_fingerprint":"42b3853151a3452e4a2c84e5c14bc47179edb2acec92e0d54d31490243bbd63d"}
